log:
Critical Security Alert:

The firewall detected over 600 failed login attempts from IP 185.92.18.44 targeting the administrator account.

Immediately after authentication succeeded, an unknown executable named ransomware.exe began encrypting files inside the Finance folder.

Windows Defender identified suspicious malware behavior while outbound traffic increased to an unknown external server.

Possible ransomware infection combined with unauthorized access has been detected.
threat: Threat Agent: Possible Brute Force Attack
response:
• Block the suspicious IP address.
• Lock the affected user account.
• Enable Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA).
• Monitor login attempts for the next 24 hours.
